data.title: StayTerra appoints Michael Toscano as CFO with 25 years experience in finance, travel, and hospitality industries.
data.description: StayTerra, a platform of leading vacation rental brands in prime U.S. destinations, disclosed new leadership team appointments today in New York. Michael Toscano has been named Chief Financial Officer, bringing more than 25 years of finance and strategic planning expertise in travel, hospitality, and consumer services. Mr. Toscano previously held the CFO position at dancker and has significant experience in the industry. The company aims to enhance its financial management and strategic initiatives with his valuable experience.

data.title: Loenbro partners with Kohlberg for growth in data center services - Kohlberg to acquire majority stake in the company.
data.description: Loenbro, LLC, based in Westminster, Colo., a provider of technical services for data centers and critical infrastructure, has recently finalized a deal with Kohlberg, a prominent U.S. middle market private equity firm. The agreement entails Kohlberg acquiring a majority share in Loenbro to propel the company's growth and development. As per the deal, Braemont Capital and current management at Loenbro will also maintain a stake in the company. This move is aimed at accelerating Loenbro's expansion in the market.

data.title: VENU plans $150M entertainment venue in Texas, 12,500-capacity amphitheater in Webster, Houston area.
data.description: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation (NYSE American: VENU) announced a significant development. The company, known for upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations, disclosed a Letter of Intent with the City of Webster in the Greater Houston, Texas area. This agreement aims to establish a cutting-edge amphitheater named Sunset Amphitheater Houston at Webster, with a 12,500 capacity. The project, powered by EIGHT Elite Light Beer, is set to become a multi-seasonal attraction in Southeast Texas.

data.title: Tanishq debuts in Orlando at The Florida Mall with its 1,800 sq. ft. boutique store opening on October 4.
data.description: In the bustling city of Orlando, Florida, Tanishq, a renowned Indian fine jewelry brand, made its grand debut at The Florida Mall. The 1,800 square foot boutique, located close to the Primark entrance on 8001 S. Orange Blossom Trail, marked the brand's first foray into the Florida market. With its launch on October 4, customers were invited to explore the exquisite offerings of the store.

data.title: UK's FCA prioritizes pound stablecoin payments for growth by 2026, in effort to maintain London's digital finance dominance.
data.description: The regulatory body overseeing the financial sector in the UK has included plans to explore the expansion of stablecoin payments tied to the British pound by 2026. This initiative comes as London works to maintain its competitive position in the realm of digital finance.

data.title: Top riders compete at 64th CHI Geneva for Rolex Grand Slam glory, taking place from Dec. 11-14 at Palexpo.
data.description: In Geneva on December 11, 2025, the prestigious Rolex Grand Slam of Show Jumping will conclude its season at the Palexpo from December 11th to 14th. CHI Geneva will host the event, which signifies the 64th edition of one of the sport's highly esteemed Majors.

data.title: IRS is not forcing crypto traders to list their wallets, despite viral claim. False alarm. Article available on Benzinga.
data.description: A misleading social media claim suggesting the IRS is mandating taxpayers to disclose their cryptocurrency wallets has been proven false. The viral post, depicting an IRS document requesting details of various digital currencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), and Ripple (XRP), along with public and private keys access, caused widespread panic. Despite receiving hundreds of thousands of views, the claim has sparked concerns about federal agencies' management of digital asset privacy.

data.title: Polyrizon reports positive results in intranasal naloxone hydrogel program, supporting its advancement; promising permeation kinetics noted.
data.description: Reported from Ra’anana, Israel, on Dec. 11, 2025, Polyrizon Ltd. (Nasdaq: PLRZ) revealed positive outcomes from the latest stage of testing its unique intranasal naloxone hydrogel. These results showcased encouraging permeation kinetics, supplementing the prior accomplishments in stability and mucoadhesion, marking significant progress in the biotechnology company’s focus on intranasal product development.

data.title: Swagelok's tube fittings aid oil & gas operators in meeting JIP33 standards, key for project success and compliance.
data.description: Solon, Ohio - On December 11, 2025, Swagelok announced its efforts to support oil and gas operators in enhancing project efficiency and meeting International Association of Oil & Gas Producers' Joint Industry Program 33 (JIP33) guidelines. This initiative aims to assist companies in adhering to specified standards.

data.title: New ETF by VanEck focuses on millennial finance, gig economy, and digital gambling, appealing to 'degen' culture.
data.description: An index comprising assets related to millennial finance, the gig economy, and digital gambling has been created, with a diverse mix of components reflecting modern trends.
Shareholding information shows entity A owns 15% of company B's shares. No other significant holdings reported.
DXY DOLLAR INDEX FALLS TO 7-WEEK LOW OF 98.460

data.title: EQT sells remaining stake in Kodiak Gas Services, a top gas compression provider in US. Company grew into one of largest in N. America under EQT ownership.
data.description: EQT has successfully concluded its departure from Kodiak Gas Services, a notable player in the gas compression sector known for its extensive service offerings. During EQT's tenure, Kodiak evolved into a major contract compression company in North America, becoming one of the largest in the region.

data.title: ProPharma opens new office in Hyderabad to support growth. Leading global provider of life sciences services. Odysse...
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina on December 11, 2025, ProPharma, a prominent global provider of regulatory, clinical, and compliance services for the life sciences sector and a part of Odyssey Investment Partners' portfolio, is utilizing a modern workspace to facilitate ongoing expansion and creativity.

data.title: MPM Medical introduces new collagen wound care kits & portal to aid patients with post-op & wound care.<Action: Enhance patient compliance & access. 100% bovine collagen kits available, aiming to improve compliance & access with HCPCS-compliant products & easy insurance verification. Launched in Mesquite, TX on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: A recently launched comprehensive solution in Mesquite, Texas, is now aiding post-operative and wound care patients by providing HCPCS-compliant collagen kits and facilitating straightforward insurance verification. MPM Medical, a prominent company in advanced wound care and producer of exclusively American-made 100% bovine products, revealed this development on December 11, 2025. This initiative aims to benefit patients requiring specialized care, enhancing efficiency and quality in treatment processes.

data.title: BEN, Skye Inteligencia LATAM, and KNOBLOCH Information Group collaborate to modernize healthcare in Mexico with Sovereign AI.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Wilmington, DE, and Mexico City, Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (Nasdaq: BNAI), known as BEN, announced a partnership with Skye Inteligencia LATAM and KNOBLOCH Information Group. BEN specializes in developing secure, governed multimodal AI solutions for regulated sectors. The collaboration aims to enhance healthcare services in Mexico, leveraging the expertise of all three companies to improve the industry.

data.title: Tanishq opens 8th US store in Tysons, Virginia - 5,500 sq. ft. showroom at 8065 Leesburg Pike.
data.description: In Tysons, Virginia, on December 11, 2025, Tanishq, a renowned fine jewelry brand from India, announced the opening of its eighth store in the U.S. The new location at 8065 Leesburg Pike, Suite 120, boasts a spacious 5,500 square foot showroom. The store officially opened its doors on August 8 and marked its entry into the market with a celebration.

data.title: Allegria Therapeutics in Basel, Switzerland secures USD 5.1M seed extension financing for mast cell-mediated diseases treatment.
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland on December 11, 2025, Allegria Therapeutics (ALLEGRIA), a Swiss biotech firm revolutionizing therapeutics for mast cell-mediated diseases, disclosed its accomplishment of a seed extension financing worth USD 5.1 million.

data.title: TripleLift finishes successful 2025 year with global expansion and partnerships in CTV, retail media, and programmatic, highlighting breakthroughs.
data.description: TripleLift, a top Creative SSP, is marking a successful year in 2025 with significant achievements. The year saw a notable global expansion, increased product innovation, and strong partnerships in CTV, retail media, and programmatic addressability. These developments have solidified TripleLift's leading position in the industry.
